project_type: AWS CDK (Python) serverless audio processing pipeline
build_system: pip for Python deps, npx cdk for CDK synthesis. NODE_OPTIONS='' required before CDK/Node commands.
test_framework: pytest with aws_cdk.assertions and unittest.mock. Fixtures in tests/conftest.py.
verification_instructions: Run pytest tests/ -q to ensure all 298 tests pass. Run cdk synth for dev environment.
setup_instructions: pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt && pip install boto3 botocore
environment_constraints: Shallow clone (depth=1) - no git history available. NODE_OPTIONS='' needed for CDK commands.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits (docs: prefix for this task). Single-concern PRs. All docs must link from README.md.
key_patterns: Documentation files at repo root: ARCHITECTURE.md, META-PROMPTS.md, SUMMARY.md, AGENT_GUIDELINES.md, README.md. README has a Documentation table at line 331 with links to all docs. The project is part of a '5 languages x 3 AIs' experiment where this repo is the Python/CDK flavor driven by Kiro.
directory_structure: Root: app.py, cdk.json, requirements.txt. cdk_base/: CDK stacks. lambda/: Lambda handlers. tests/: 298 tests. .github/workflows/ci.yml: CI pipeline.
